title: AttackCategory
description: AttackCategory schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma AIRS AI Red Teaming API

category_id.description: Unique identifier for the attack category.

description.description: Description of the vulnerability class this category tests.

attack_count.description: Number of built-in attack probes in this category.

severity_range.description: Severity range of vulnerabilities this category can discover.

examples.description: Example attack type names within this category.
